fields.acceptance_criteria: Search bar supporting free-text and field:value syntax; results ranked by relevance; state/type facets shown; click result opens ticket; queries via GET /api/tickets?query=...
fields.title: Feature: Full-text search UI with field predicates

fields.acceptance_criteria: Search bar with keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K or /) to focus; supports free-text and field:value predicate syntax (mapped to ticket-api Tantivy FTS); results ranked by relevance; state/type facets shown as filter chips; click result opens ticket in detail panel; recent searches stored in localStorage; endpoint: verify actual search endpoint path against ticket-http API spec; document supported predicate syntax in UI tooltip
fields.title: Feature: Full-text search UI with field predicates
